title: sv: Error checking for always_comb, always_latch and always_ff

features.name: always_comb with explicit sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include always_comb block with an explicit @(...) sensitivity list which is a syntax error per SV semantics
features.snippet: always_comb @(posedge clk) begin x = y; end

features.name: always_latch with explicit sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include always_latch block with an explicit @(...) sensitivity list which is a syntax error per SV semantics
features.snippet: always_latch @(posedge clk) begin if (en) q <= d; end

features.name: always_ff with latch-like behavior
features.description: Code should include always_ff block containing latch inference behavior (conditional assignment without clock edge) which should be flagged as incorrect usage
features.snippet: always_ff @(posedge clk) begin if (en) q <= d; end

features.name: always_comb with latch inference
features.description: Code should include always_comb block that infers a latch (missing else branch or conditional without clock) which should be flagged
features.snippet: always_comb begin if (en) q = d; end
